column4:
Autism knowledge scores are calculated in 2 ways. There were 8 knowledge questions that we measured here:
tfa_genetics, tfa_vaccines, tfa_tylenol, tfa_medications, tfa_rate, tfa_behavior_age (need to verify the right answer),tfa_autistic_us, tfa_mult_kids_odds
 
First method: participants responding correctly to the knowledge questions gets 1 points otherwise no pints. Scores range from 0-8.

Second method (got significant result): The correct option will get 4 points. For the slider knowledge questions, teh responses can be from 1 - 4. The correct response will get 4 points and other responses will get 3, 2, 1 points accordingly.
